name: Petsmile Professional Toothbrush + Rotisserie Chicken Flavor Dog Toothpaste, 4.2-oz tube
description: Petsmile Professional Dog & Cat Toothbrush — Your pup’s pearly whites and feline’s grin have never been brighter! The Petsmile Professional Pet Toothbrush is designed to effectively remove plaque, food and bacteria from teeth and gums. A patented 45-degree angled brush head allows side and center bristles to polish teeth while scrubbing hard-to-reach areas. Featuring dual ends that fit dogs and cats of all sizes, the toothbrush’s grip helps you stay in control if your pet is a bit unruly! Regular brushing helps reduce your furry friends’ risk of gum disease and tooth decay—how paw-some!
